request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in the Pacific are now contributing 20% more to shared defense costs than just 5 years ago? While some politicians claim we're carrying the burden alone, the facts show a different story. Our partnerships are stronger than ever, and it's time to recognize the progress we've made together. #StrongAlliances #SharedSecurity
